title: Alternative Armors
description: Reimagined Armors with a vanilla flavour!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/byVRpNp1y10" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This Resource pack changes the models and icons of the Vanilla armors, and also the armors from [Deeper And Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker/versions) mod, trying to be close to the game's art-style, using almost the same color palette, but at the same time revamping their look.
overall, they feel less "bulky".**

Right now, the only armor that remains unchanged, is the chainmail armor.
it should be compatible with almost every version of the game.
if you have any issues with the resource pack, contact me, i appreciate your feedback.

Also check the gallery!

![Replace Vanilla Armors with new unique designs!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd62766088364105f339dd63d0d06922b87cd637_0.webp)


**check my other works**: [Copper Lighter](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copper-lighter)
